Partners

Our partners

Communities and bots that we trust and work closely with.

V
Vortex Community
Discord server
A thriving 10,000+ member tech and gaming community. One of our earliest adopters and long-time partners.
Visit server
N
NexusBot
Bot partner
A complementary Discord bot focused on leveling, economy, and fun. Works great alongside Dracon's moderation.
Learn more
S
ServerShield
Security partner
An advanced threat intelligence service that powers some of Dracon's ban-list syncing and raid detection features.
Learn more
D
DevHouse Labs
Developer community
A developer community that helped beta-test Dracon's slash command system and contributed to our open feedback program.
Visit server
P
ProxyList
Bot list partner
A curated Discord bot directory that featured Dracon as a top moderation bot. Great exposure for growing bots.
View listing
+

Become a partner

We partner with Discord servers, bots, and communities that share our values. If you're interested, reach out on Discord.
